name: Observable Internal Behavioral Discrepancy
description: The product performs multiple internal operations to produce a single result, but individual operation outcomes are separately observable, allowing attackers to decompose composite operations. For example, a login system revealing whether the username exists separately from password validity.
detection_pattern: Look for a sequence of CONTROL or AUTH nodes (username lookup then password check) where each step produces a distinct observable EGRESS signal (different error message, different timing) without a TRANSFORM node (atomic response composition) that combines all sub-operation results into a single indistinguishable output.
